5.11.52.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.52: Added remote dimmer driver, fixed vibration sensor triggers, and improved Gmail token handling.

5.11.51.en: Fixes for vibration sensor triggers and adds remote dimmer driver. 145 drivers, 4959 fingerprints.

5.11.50.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.50 adds a new remote dimmer driver and improves Gmail diagnostics.

5.11.49.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.49 adds a new remote dimmer driver and a GitHub Deep Search engine for enhanced fingerprint and converter searches.

5.11.48.en: Added remote dimmer driver for Lidl HG06323 TS1001 and GitHub Deep Search engine for Zigbee projects.

5.11.47.en: Added support for Lidl HG06323 TS1001 remote dimmer and enhanced ZCL cluster adapters.

5.11.46.en: Added ZCL cluster adapters and converters for Z2M, ZHA, and deCONZ; enhanced security.

5.11.45.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.45: Fixed Gmail token recovery, resolved open PRs/issues, and enhanced diagnostics.

5.11.44.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.44 adds new features for fingerprint research and diagnostics, with 144 drivers and 4956 fingerprints.

5.11.43.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.43 adds new drivers and enhances diagnostics with PII sanitization.

5.11.42.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.42 adds new automation for variant discovery and enhances driver capabilities with 144 drivers and 4943 fingerprints.

5.11.41.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.41 adds auto-discovery for all variants and product IDs, includes 144 drivers and 4943 fingerprints.

5.11.40.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.40 adds 3077 new fingerprints and introduces an IR Remote driver.

5.11.39.en: Added support for Zigbee IR Remote (Moes UFO-R11 / TS1201) with new capabilities.

5.11.38.en: Added 10 new fingerprints and improved auto-resolution for GitHub issues in v5.11.38.

5.11.37.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.37: Added 9 missing fingerprints, improved auto-resolution, and fixed promotion pipeline.

5.11.36.en: Added 9 missing fingerprints and improved diagnostics scan functionality.

5.11.35.en: Updated Universal Tuya Zigbee app to v5.11.35 with 143 drivers and 4918 fingerprints.

5.11.34.en: Updated to v5.11.34 with comprehensive getSetting audit and workflow improvements.

5.11.33.en: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.11.33: Added diagnostics infrastructure and bug fixes, updated 143 drivers with 3057 fingerprints.

5.11.53.en: v5.11.52: Fixed vibration sensor triggers for alarm_vibration, temperature, and flow (Forum #1559/#1561)., Added remote_dimmer driver for Lidl HG06323 TS1001 with full Zosung protocol support., Implemented GitHub Deep Search engine to search over 20 Zigbee projects for fingerprints, devices, and converters., Hardened Gmail token rotation for Testing mode with a 7-day cycle., Updated auto-publish f
